selected_issue.issue: Missing per-code violation reason counters in replay verification summary
selected_issue.title: tools/replay_verification_assess.py emitted only aggregate violation totals, not reason-code distributions needed for diagnostics triage

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence on agent-base showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: structural invariant totals were zero, canonical tests passed (375), replay mode usage had no mismatch signal, and diagnostic/invariant violation totals were zero. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 missing instrumentation: replay summary lacked per-code violation counters needed to localize failure reasons when violations occur.

files_changed.change: Added per-code counters for contract structural violations, contract behavioral violations, and invariant violations; emitted them in summary.
Added required schema fields for the three per-code violation counter maps.
Added assertions that new per-code violation counter fields are present on canonical fixture output.

validation_performed.result: new per-code violation counter fields present on multimatch fixture summary

before_after_evidence.before: Replay summary exposed aggregate violation totals only and did not include per-code reason frequency maps.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay summary now includes per-code counter maps for contract structural/behavioral violations and invariant violations.

unresolved_risks: Current canonical fixtures have zero violations, so non-empty distributions are not exercised in this run.
Counter quality depends on upstream correctness of emitted violation code strings.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation issue fixed with minimal changes and stable validation; additional synthetic failure generation would exceed bounded single-issue scope.
